name: @wavex-os/cloud-client
description: Clients for the WaveX OS Console: HTTP for the device-pairing edge functions (os-link-device, os-claim-device, os-device-token, os-device-refresh) and the spend-intent stub, plus a Supabase Realtime channel for routing inference calls to the operator Mac (replaces the previous Cloudflare-Tunnel HTTP path). Reads/writes the device token bundle at ~/.wavex-os/device-token.json. Imported by Liaison + future tier-router + the wavex-os login CLI.
